description: Rodin Platform release candidate - Event-B IDE (pre-release)
notes: Release candidate / pre-release build. Installs to its own Scoop dir alongside the
stable 'rodin' package but shares the 'Rodin' Start Menu shortcut, so the last-installed wins.
Rodin needs Java 17+ (pulled in via the java bucket); it finds the JDK on PATH.
The download filename embeds an opaque build id (timestamp + git hash); autoupdate
recovers it from the SourceForge folder RSS feed, so url/hash auto-bump on release.
